ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of the agency (e.g., regulatory, service, administrative) */,
  "budget_officer" INTEGER /* ID of the primary budget officer */,
  "budget_year_start" TEXT /* Start of the fiscal year for the agency */,
  "budget_year_end" TEXT /* End of the fiscal year for the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget activity */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated agency */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the activity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_activities_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The actual year (e.g., 2016, 2017) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fiscal year (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_data" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated budget activity */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "enacted_budget" REAL /* Enacted budget amount */,
  "annualized_cr" REAL /* Annualized cost recovery */,
  "request" REAL /* Budget request amount */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Change amount from previous year */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change from previous year */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was approved */,
  "rejected_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was rejected */,
  "reason_for_rejection" TEXT /* Reason for budget rejection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES budget_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_data_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget request */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated budget activity */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "requested_amount" REAL /* Requested amount for the budget */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved */,
  "rejected_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was rejected */,
  "reason_for_rejection" TEXT /* Reason for request rejection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_requests_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES budget_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_requests_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated budget activity */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "expenditure_amount" REAL /* Amount spent */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the expenditure (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure was approved */,
  "rejected_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure was rejected */,
  "reason_for_rejection" TEXT /* Reason for expenditure rejection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_expenditures_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_expenditures_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES budget_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated budget activity */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "current_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the budget activity */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the balance was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_balances_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES budget_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_balances_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated budget activity */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Amount changed (positive or negative) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was approved */,
  "rejected_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was rejected */,
  "reason_for_rejection" TEXT /* Reason for change rejection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_changes_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_changes_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES budget_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated budget activity */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., revenue, expenditure, summary) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  "rejected_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was rejected */,
  "reason_for_rejection" TEXT /* Reason for report rejection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reports_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reports_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES budget_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, agency head, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or position of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the budget data */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget activity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES budget_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget activity related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES budget_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or section of the system where the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
